chain.consignment_cycle.description:
Arrangement signed → goods shipped to consignee → on-hand opened →
consignee reports sale → consignor invoices consignee → payment received.

chain.o2c_services_over_time.title: O2C SERVICES OVER TIME

collection.activities.description: Activities — calls / emails / meetings log per lead / opportunity / customer.
collection.ai-suggestions.description: AI Suggestions — durable audit row per Cloudflare Workers AI inference.
collection.api-audit-events.description:
API Audit Events — generic landing collection for every external-API
call the project makes (FX rate lookups, VAT validation, sanctions
screening, e-invoicing discovery, business-registry lookups, mTLS
filings).
collection.archive.description: Archive block — paginated list of posts/products/etc.
collection.audit-events.description: Audit Events — persistent ISO 19011 / SOX §404 evidence trail.
collection.audit-findings.description: Audit Findings — issues raised by internal/external auditors against controls.
collection.bank-accounts.description: Bank Accounts — master data, separate from BankStatements (transactions).
collection.bank-reconciliations.descript:
Bank Reconciliations — periodic GL ↔ bank balance reconciliation
with explicit difference accounting.
collection.bank-transactions.description:
Bank Transactions — individual bank-statement lines normalised out of
BankStatements.
collection.banner.description: Banner block — full-width informational notice (info / warning / error / success).
collection.beneficial-owners.description: Beneficial Owners — UBO register per AML / Corporate Transparency Act.
collection.bills-of-materials.descriptio: Bills of Materials (BOM) — components + quantities per finished good.
collection.biological-assets.description:
Biological Assets — IAS 41 living plants + animals at fair-value
less costs to sell.
collection.bookable-resources.descriptio:
Bookable Resources — catalog of anything reservable (rooms, vehicles,
equipment, beds, conference suites, machinery, time slots).
collection.business-combinations.descrip: Business Combinations — IFRS 3 acquirer-side M&A register.
collection.carbon-emissions.description: Carbon Emissions — EU CSRD ESRS E1 + GHG Protocol Scope 1/2/3 register.
collection.carriers.description: Carriers — shipping/freight carrier master per tenant.
collection.commitments-and-contingencies:
Commitments & Contingencies — IAS-37 §27-92 + IFRS-15 §B50 mandatory
disclosure of off-balance-sheet items.
collection.consignment-inventory.descrip:
Consignment Inventory — per-SKU on-hand running balance at consignee
locations.
collection.consignment-sales.description:
Consignment Sales — sale-by-consignee events that resolve the
IFRS-15 §B77 control-transfer indicators and trigger revenue
recognition + inventory derecognition.
collection.consolidation-eliminations.de: Consolidation Eliminations — group consolidation elimination entries.
collection.content.description: Content block — multi-column rich-text + optional inline link.
collection.contracts.description: Contracts — IFRS 15 / ASC 606 master contract record.
collection.control-tests.description: Control Tests — SOX §404 testing evidence (sampling, walkthrough, results).
collection.cost-centers.description: Cost Centers — analytical dimension for GL postings.
collection.cost-variances.description: Cost Variances — IAS-2 §21 standard-cost vs actual-cost variances.
collection.course-builder.description: Example tenant configs — self-contained, business-model-agnostic templates.
collection.csrd-disclosures.description:
CSRD Disclosures — EU CSRD Directive 2022/2464 + ESRS 1/2 mandatory
sustainability-reporting register.
collection.cta.description: Call-to-action block — promoted link group + supporting copy.
collection.customs-declarations.descript: Customs Declarations — WCO HS-coded export/import declarations.
collection.deferred-tax-items.descriptio: Deferred Tax Items — IAS 12 income-taxes timing differences.
collection.demo.description: End-to-end demo seed — exercises every wired event/handler in one cycle.
collection.depreciation-schedules.descri: Depreciation Schedules — period-by-period IAS 16 depreciation detail.
collection.dunning-cycles.description: Dunning Cycles — collection-process record per overdue invoice.
collection.earnings-per-share.descriptio: Earnings per Share — IAS 33 basic + diluted EPS calculations.
collection.employees.description: Employees — workforce master record for payroll, benefits, time tracking.
collection.evidence-attestations.descrip:
Evidence Attestations — signed PDF cover sheets produced by
`src/services/evidence-attestation.
collection.expense-reports.description: Expense Reports — employee expense claims with approval + reimbursement.
collection.fair-value-measurements.descr: Fair Value Measurements — IFRS 13 Level-1/2/3 hierarchy register.
collection.footer.description: Footer global config — site-wide colophon + secondary navigation.
collection.fx-transactions.description: FX Transactions — IAS-21 §28-29 monetary-item re-translation entries.
collection.goods-receipts.description: Goods Receipts — second leg of three-way match (PO → Receipt → Factuur).
collection.government-grants.description:
Government Grants — IAS-20 + ASC 958-605 register of public-sector
incentives + EU funds + national subsidies.
collection.header.description: Seed endpoint — populates a fresh tenant with example pages, posts, media.
collection.held-for-sale-classifications:
Held-for-Sale Classifications — IFRS 5 non-current assets / disposal
groups classified as held-for-sale + discontinued-operations register.
collection.home.description: generatePreviewPath tests — signed admin live-preview URL builder.
collection.hosts.description: Level 3 E2E Test Suite — complete accounting workflows.
collection.insurance-contracts.descripti: Insurance Contracts — IFRS 17 GMM / PAA / VFA register.
collection.intercompany-transactions.des:
Intercompany Transactions — paired transactions between two tenants
(group entities) that must net to zero on consolidation.
collection.inventory-movements.descripti: Inventory Movements — every quantity change with source/destination.
collection.investment-properties.descrip:
Investment Properties — IAS 40 land/buildings held to earn rental
income or capital appreciation (NOT for own use; NOT for sale in
ordinary course).
collection.job-positions.description: Job Positions — open positions + org-chart anchor.
collection.kyc-checks.description: KYC Checks — AML / Customer Due Diligence record per customer / vendor.
collection.lease-modifications.descripti:
Lease Modifications — IFRS-16 §44-46 + ASC 842-10-25-12 structured
register of lease changes (term extension, payment change, scope
change, partial / full termination).
collection.lease-period-postings.descrip: Lease Period Postings — period-by-period IAS 16 / ASC 842 evidence.
collection.leases.description: Leases — IFRS 16 / ASC 842 right-of-use asset + lease liability.
collection.leave-requests.description: Leave Requests — vacation / sick / parental / unpaid leave register.
collection.legal-entities.description: Legal Entities — IFRS-10 §B86 group structure (distinct from `tenants`).
collection.maintenance-requests.descript: Maintenance Requests — user-raised tickets per ISO 41001 §8.
collection.maintenance-work-orders.descr: Maintenance Work Orders — CMMS execution rows per ISO 41001 §8.
collection.mineral-resource-assets.descr: Mineral Resource Assets — IFRS 6 exploration & evaluation register.
collection.opportunities.description: Opportunities — sales pipeline with weighted forecast.
collection.payment-allocations.descripti:
Betaling Allocations — explicit allocation table for payments that
partially or fully settle one OR MORE invoices/bills.
collection.payment-runs.description: Betaling Runs — ISO 20022 batch payment initiation.
collection.payroll-runs.description: Payroll Runs — periodic batch payroll: gross-to-net, accruals, disbursement.
collection.performance-obligations.descr: Performance Obligations — IFRS 15 §22 distinct promises within a contract.
collection.performance-reviews.descripti: Performance Reviews — annual / quarterly review records.
collection.platform.description:
Documentation pages seed — populates the default erpax site with a nested
documentation hub under the canonical Pages collection.
collection.post-balance-sheet-events.des: Post-Balance-Sheet Events — IAS 10 events after the reporting period.
collection.prior-period-adjustments.desc:
Prior-Period Adjustments — IAS-8 §42-49 retrospective corrections of
material errors discovered after a period was closed.
collection.pro.description: Subscription-gate tests — plan-based access control + revenue-state gating.
collection.production-receipts.descripti:
Production Receipts — finished-good receipts from a work-order into
inventory, with the absorbed-cost figure per IAS-2 §10.
collection.products.description: erpax product pages — marketing seed for monetization.
collection.project-milestones.descriptio: Project Milestones — IFRS-15 §126 milestone-billing trigger points.
collection.project-tasks.description: Project Tasks — work breakdown of a project into trackable units.
collection.projects.description: Projects — anchor for IFRS-15 §35 over-time revenue recognition.
collection.properties.description: Properties — real-estate property master per ISO 41001 / ISO 55000.
collection.provisions.description: Provisions — IAS-37 §14 + ASC 450 mandatory liability disclosure.
collection.purchase-orders.description: Purchase Orders — first leg of three-way match (PO ↔ receipt ↔ invoice).
collection.purchase-requisitions.descrip: Purchase Requisitions — pre-PO approval chain (SOX §404 four-eyes).
collection.recruiting-pipeline.descripti: Recruiting Pipeline — applicants / interviews / offers per position.
collection.recurring-journals.descriptio:
Recurring Journals — automation register for IAS-1 §27 accrual-basis
entries that recur on a schedule (rent, depreciation accrual,
amortisation, prepaid release, deferred-revenue release, etc.
Regulatory Deferral Accounts — IFRS 14 first-time-adopter rate-
regulated activities (utilities, telcos under price-cap regimes).
collection.returns.description: Returns / RMA — customer-return authorisation with inventory + GL reversal.
collection.rounding-adjustments.descript:
Rounding Adjustments — IAS-1 §51(e) presentation rounding entries
+ IAS-21 §39 functional-to-presentation FX rounding fragments.
collection.sales-commissions.description:
Sales Commissions — IFRS-15 §91-94 incremental costs of obtaining a
contract (capitalisable when amortisation period ≥ 1 year).
collection.share-based-payments.descript:
Share-Based Betalings — IFRS 2 equity-settled & cash-settled employee
compensation register.
collection.spaces.description:
Spaces — sub-property zones (floor / room / desk / zone) for IWMS
space management.
collection.tax-returns.description: Tax Returns — filed return record (separate from TaxCalculations which is the snapshot).
collection.tenants.description: Level 2 Integration Tests — multi-document relationships, realistic seeds.
collection.time-entries.description: Time Entries — per-day / per-task time records for payroll + project costing.
collection.tracking-events.description: Tracking Events — per-leg shipment status updates from carrier APIs.
collection.transaction-failures.descript: Transaction Failures — error queue for retry / SOX evidence trail.
collection.transfer-pricing-files.descri:
Transfer Pricing Files — OECD BEPS Action 13 Master File + Local File
+ Country-by-Country Report (CbCR) structured register.
collection.usage-records.description: Usage Records — metered-billing event log per tenant per feature.
collection.users.description: Config Discovery advanced tests — custom validators, field-type coercion.
collection.vendor-quotes.description: Vendor Quotes / RFQs — supplier RFQ responses (BEPS Action 13 evidence).
collection.vendor-scorecards.description: Vendor Scorecards — periodic OTD / quality / response-time metrics.
collection.warehouse-locations.descripti: Warehouse Locations — physical / logical stock locations.
collection.wip-snapshots.description: WIP Snapshots — periodic Work-in-Progress valuation per project.
collection.work-orders.description: Work Orders — production-order header + execution log.
collection.workflow-definitions.descript: Workflow Definitions — BPMN-style multi-step approval definitions.
collection.workflow-instances.descriptio:
Workflow Instances — running execution of a `workflow-definition` against
a specific document.
dashboardIntro: Dit is wat je vervolgens moet doen:
dashboardLi2c: indien nodig. Als u nieuw bent in Payload, raden we u ook aan de
dashboardLi3: Zet uw wijzigingen vast en push ze naar de repository om een ​​herimplementatie van uw project te activeren.
dashboardProTip: Pro tip: dit blok is a
dashboardProTipEnd: , u kunt dit op elk moment verwijderen door uw
dashboardSeedMid: met enkele pagina's, berichten en projecten om uw nieuwe site aan de gang te krijgen, en
formConfirmationTypeDescription: Kies of u een bericht op de pagina wilt weergeven of wilt omleiden naar een ander e-mailadres na het indienen.
formEmailsDescription: Stuur aangepaste e-mails wanneer het formulier wordt verzonden. Gebruik door komma's gescheiden ontvangerslijsten. Gebruik {{fieldName}} om veldwaarden in te voegen.
formMessageDescription: Voer het bericht in dat in deze e-mail moet worden verzonden.
formRedirectURLLabel: URL om naar om te leiden
link.appearanceDescription: Kies hoe de koppeling moet worden weergegeven.
link.label: Etiket
media.caption: Bijschrift
pages.title: Titel
plugins.redirectFromHelp: U moet de website opnieuw samenstellen wanneer u dit veld wijzigt.
posts.title: Titel
product-checkout-note: Winkelwagen en afrekenen gebruiken de e-commerceprovider; configureer Stripe om betalingen mogelijk te maken.
products.title: Titel
search.title: Titel
something-went-wrong-try-again: Er is iets misgegaan, probeer het opnieuw.
tenants.allowPublicReadHelp: Indien aangevinkt, is aanmelden niet vereist voor het lezen. Nuttig voor het maken van openbare pagina's.
tenants.emailDefaultFromAddressHelp: Standaard e-mailadres van Resend (deze huurder). Valt terug op onboarding@resend.dev als dit leeg is.
tenants.integrationSettingsHelp: Willekeurige JSON voor per-huurder-integratie-instellingen (API-sleutels, functiemarkeerders, enz.). Gebruik in aangepaste hooks of API-routes.
tenants.localesHelp: Openbare websitetalen voor deze huurder. Laat leeg om alle geconfigureerde talen toe te staan.
tenants.mcpApiKeyHelp: Optionele MCP-API-sleutel voor tools/scripts die tot deze huurder beperkt zijn (alleen super-admin). Kies Admin → MCP-sleutels bij gebruik van Payload MCP.
tenants.name: Naam
tenants.publicSiteUrlHelp: Optionele canonieke website-URL voor deze huurder (vervangen aanvraaghost indien ingesteld). Laat leeg om de inkomende aanvraaghost te gebruiken.
tenants.resendApiKeyHelp: Sleutel voor Resend-API voor transactionele e-mail voor deze huurder (alleen super-admin). Ontwikkeling kan terugvallen op RESEND_API_KEY.
tenants.stripePublishableHelp: Stripe-publiceerbare sleutel voor de winkel van deze huurder (optioneel). Valt terug op NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY als dit leeg is.
tenants.stripeSecretHelp: Stripe-geheime sleutel (alleen super-admin). Serverafrekening gebruikt STRIPE_SECRET_KEY tenzij u aangepaste betalingsroutes per huurder toevoegt.
tenants.stripeWebhookHelp: Stripe webhook-handtekeningsgeheim voor deze huurder (alleen super-admin). Globale STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET wordt gebruikt door de standaardadapter.
toastGenericError: Er is een fout opgetreden. Vernieuwen en opnieuw proberen.
toastSeedError: Er is een fout opgetreden bij het zaaien.
toastSeeding: Zaaien is al aan de gang.
users.name: Naam
